title: 12 air tickets for students leaving for Japan
body_lines: Air tickets were handed over to 12 young students through the IRO College of Education technical intern recruit Sri Lankan workers in Japan. The air tickets were handed over at the Gangaramaya temple in Colombo yesterday. These students will leave for Japan on Wednesday (22). After receiving the tickets, the students were blessed by the Deputy Incumbent Gangaramaya Temple Dr. Kirinde Assaji Thera. Pix by Pradeep Dilrukshana
